---
title: "debug_tree.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/debug_tree.ts"
loc: 31
complexity: 4
logic_score: 6.80
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 2.69
overall_score: 3.25
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [getParser](file://./src/tools/pennyone/parser.js)
- [TreeSitter](file://./src/tools/pennyone/parser.js)
- [*](file://fs/promises)

### Exports
- `debug`
- `target`
- `code`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `complexityQuerySource`
- `complexityQuery`
- `matches`
- `manualCount`
- `traverse`
- `i`
